Drift: texo on its own prose

This is a snapshot of texo ingesting this repository's own markdown — README, ADRs, specs, hackathon notes. Claims about the old architecture surface as superseded by the docs that replaced them; nothing is deleted, everything carries its receipt. Generated byjust drift-ui.

Superseded

old truths, retired with receipts

Conflicting

open disputes, both sides shown

what the docs assert today
